programme.title: E2 - Mojo Rocks
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: E25 - Ragdoll
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: E24 - Faceytalk
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: E18 - The In Charge Badge
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: E19 - Mysterious Milkshake
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: E19 - The Claw
programme.desc: When Bluey and Bingo are unable to grab a prize on a Magic Claw machine, Mum and Dad create their own version at home. But Dad isn't about to make winning easy.

programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.title: E45 - The Singing Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels are out on a walk in the countryside. Its been a long walk and the squirrels are starting to get tired, but it's a long way back. Don't worry, Duggee has his singing badge.

programme.title: E44 - The Comedy Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels go to see what Duggee is doing but on the way Tag stumbles on some toy blocks and hurts his knee. How can they make him feel better? Happy's mum says laughter is the best medicine.

programme.title: E5 - The Continent Of Europe
programme.desc: The Go Jetters help Grandmaster Glitch take his own souvenir selfies across Europe.

programme.title: TV Patrol Live[Live]
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: Incognito
programme.desc: Private Military Contractors (PMCs) engage in high-stakes tasks daily, with many skilled Filipino soldiers involved. Incognito follows ex-soldiers on covert missions, blending intense action with themes of honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: Ye Hai Mohabbatein
programme.desc: A Tamil dentist and Punjabi businessman fall in love, navigating family expectations, parenting, and emotional complexities across cultures.

programme.title: E5 - Super Creative Day of Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a super creative day of play with Twinkle! First, it's time to get musical! Each toadstool makes a different musical note, allowing Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to create a musical tune. Then, get creative as Twinkle has fun painting a picture of what she sees. The fun continues as Twinkle shares a box full of super fun toys, & her friends learn how to play new musical instruments!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E1 - Animals, Numbers, ABCs & More Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready to learn about animals, numbers, ABCs & more! Join Kii & Yii as they head to Old MacDonald's farm to learn all the sounds the animals make. Then it's time to learn numbers by singing along & counting the five cute penguins & five little ducks! The learning continues with a fun animal bus ride, a trip to space to sing 'Hey Diddle Diddle' & an important lesson on how to cross the road carefully with a mother cat & her kitten.

programme.title: E3 - A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big playtime sing-along with Mia & Max! First, they play a fun fishing game in the garden with Mummy & Daddy, learning their colors as they catch different colored fish. Then, Mia & Maple learn to play together by setting up a super cute tea party with all their cuddly toys. The playtime fun continues as Mia & Max pretend to be puppies, crawling & barking while singing the classic song 'BINGO!' with their parents.

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E1 - Teamwork Makes the Dream Work!
programme.desc: Buster is learning that teamwork makes the dream work! During a big soccer match, Buster is very competitive, but he learns the value of being a team player to help his team win the game. Then, when he & his friend Scout get lost in a big hedge maze, they find that they have to work together to find their way out. From cleaning up toys to helping a friend who is stuck in the mud, teamwork always saves the day!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster Becomes a Superhero!
programme.desc: Watch as Buster becomes a real-life superhero! When a storm starts during a nature walk, everyone panics, but it's up to brave Buster to lead them all safely home through the rain & wind. Then, Buster wants to be an emergency vehicle. He gets his chance to be a hero when he's guarding the fire station & a fire breaks out! It's up to Buster the hero fire truck to save the day. From flying like Super Buster to rescuing a kitten, he's always a hero!

programme.title: E5 - Imagination & Problem Solving Fun!
programme.desc: Join Baby John for some imagination & problem-solving fun! Oh no, Teddy is missing! But don't worry, Mom, Dad, Jack & Jill are all there to help Baby John search for him & solve the mystery. Then, dressed as pigs, Baby John, Jack & Jill use their imagination to re-enact the classic 'Three Little Pigs' story, with Dad playing the Big Bad Wolf! The problem-solving continues as the family helps guide Jill through the experience of losing her first tooth.

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster Becomes a Superhero!
programme.desc: Watch as Buster becomes a real-life superhero! When a storm starts during a nature walk, everyone panics, but it's up to brave Buster to lead them all safely home through the rain & wind. Then, Buster wants to be an emergency vehicle. He gets his chance to be a hero when he's guarding the fire station & a fire breaks out! It's up to Buster the hero fire truck to save the day. From flying like Super Buster to rescuing a kitten, he's always a hero!

programme.title: E3 - JJ's Favorite Classic Sing-Alongs!
programme.desc: Get ready to dance to all of JJ's favorite classic sing-alongs! Try to keep up as the kids groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' going a little bit faster with each verse! Then, have fun tumbling off the stage as they play a silly game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The party continues as they play the 'Who Took the Cookie?' game & march along to 'John Jacob Jingleheimer Schmidt.' It's a dance party full of timeless, interactive fun!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. The learning continues with a fun animal bus ride, a trip to space to sing 'Hey Diddle Diddle' & an important lesson on how to cross the road carefully with a mother cat & her kitten.

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E3 - JJ's Favorite Classic Sing-Alongs!
programme.desc: Get ready to dance to all of JJ's favorite classic sing-alongs! Try to keep up as the kids groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' going a little bit faster with each verse! Then, have fun tumbling off the stage as they play a silly game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The party continues as they play the 'Who Took the Cookie?' game & march along to 'John Jacob Jingleheimer Schmidt.' It's a dance party full of timeless, interactive fun!

programme.title: E5 - Imagination & Problem Solving Fun!
programme.desc: Join Baby John for some imagination & problem-solving fun! Oh no, Teddy is missing! But don't worry, Mom, Dad, Jack & Jill are all there to help Baby John search for him & solve the mystery. Then, dressed as pigs, Baby John, Jack & Jill use their imagination to re-enact the classic 'Three Little Pigs' story, with Dad playing the Big Bad Wolf! The problem-solving continues as the family helps guide Jill through the experience of losing her first tooth.

programme.title: E1 - Teamwork Makes the Dream Work!
programme.desc: Buster is learning that teamwork makes the dream work! During a big soccer match, Buster is very competitive, but he learns the value of being a team player to help his team win the game. Then, when he & his friend Scout get lost in a big hedge maze, they find that they have to work together to find their way out. From cleaning up toys to helping a friend who is stuck in the mud, teamwork always saves the day!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E5 - Super Creative Day of Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a super creative day of play with Twinkle! First, it's time to get musical! Each toadstool makes a different musical note, allowing Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to create a musical tune. Then, get creative as Twinkle has fun painting a picture of what she sees. The fun continues as Twinkle shares a box full of super fun toys, & her friends learn how to play new musical instruments!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E1 - Animals, Numbers, ABCs & More Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready to learn about animals, numbers, ABCs & more! Join Kii & Yii as they head to Old MacDonald's farm to learn all the sounds the animals make. Then it's time to learn numbers by singing along & counting the five cute penguins & five little ducks! The learning continues with a fun animal bus ride, a trip to space to sing 'Hey Diddle Diddle' & an important lesson on how to cross the road carefully with a mother cat & her kitten.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime

programme.title: #Tech24[Live]

programme.title: Chronique culture[Live]

programme.title: E15 - Nothin'to It But To Do It
programme.desc: When Li'l D finds out that Sunny will have to spend his Saturday relaxing at a teacher's retreat instead of tackling his weekend To-Do List Li'l D proposes that he and the Westley kids do Sunny's chores in exchange for the use of Sunny's state-of-the-art home studio. But when Li'l D throws away Sunny's How To Do the To Do List the kids soon find that getting things done just might do them in.

programme.desc: An outrageously insane new game show of puzzles and brainteasers for kids to play on television.

programme.title: E16 - Gazpacho!
programme.desc: When Gazpacho arrives home to find his mother missing, he mistakenly assumes that she's been taken hostage by ninjas.

programme.title: E17 - The Toots
programme.desc: After eating the tootin' fruit Chowder's backside begins to sing.

programme.title: E15 - Nothin'to It But To Do It
programme.desc: When Li'l D finds out that Sunny will have to spend his Saturday relaxing at a teacher's retreat instead of tackling his weekend To-Do List Li'l D proposes that he and the Westley kids do Sunny's chores in exchange for the use of Sunny's state-of-the-art home studio. But when Li'l D throws away Sunny's How To Do the To Do List the kids soon find that getting things done just might do them in.

programme.title: Our Memory - A Phenomenal Storage System
programme.desc: Our memory is a machine of superlatives. Every second, it processes unimaginable amounts of information, decides what's important and what's not, and stores what we experience and learn.

programme.title: Old But Bold - How An 81-Year-Old Sprinter Chases A World Record
programme.desc: How do you stay fit in old age? Friedhelm Adorf has the answer. The 81-year-old exercises every morning, eats a healthy diet and trains for a world record: the 200m sprint in his age group. Unfortunately, his knee is giving him problems. Will he still succeed?

programme.title: Young And Lonely - Ways Out Of Isolation
programme.desc: Loneliness is often underestimated - especially among young people. The documentary follows four young people: Ellen, Gordon, Lilli and Vanelynn, who feel isolated for very different reasons.

programme.title: European Narcos - Part 2 - The Weakness Of States
programme.desc: In Rotterdam, local street gangs join forces with Colombians to build their empire. Driven by raging demand, the cocaine trade has triggered an unprecedented wave of violence.

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story and based on the hit eponymous Italian drama series, Doc begins its second season of the life-affirming medical drama following the heartbreak and victories of hard-charging, brilliant physician Dr. Amy Larsen (Molly Parker) as she rebuilds her life after a car crash erased eight years of her memory. This season, Amy will continue to confront hard truths about her missing years, work to repair fractured relationships and seek to reconcile the person she used to be with the one everyone else has come to know.

programme.title: E7 - A Rendezvous With The Moon

programme.title: E21 - Ulgador/The Hermes Birkin Bag/French Linen/Black And White
programme.desc: Gabor and Rahel, founders of Ulgador and designers of gilded decorative items, join forces and expertise with Aude Taon, textile designer. An in-depth look at an emblematic Hermes creation, the Birkin bag. Behind the scenes of French linen production. The star of colour combinations: how to wear black and white.

programme.desc: The Guadeloupe-born chef Jean-Rony Leriche has settled in Paris. programme.title: E12 - 范丞丞神總結節目調性
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 丁當在訂婚前夕與初戀陳阿明重逢，卻不料對方竟改名餘坤並擁有了新身份，為治癒陳阿明因實驗失敗導致的人格分裂，丁當與友人暗中佈局，以糖衣計劃引導他直面過去的傷痛，從撕裂的情感與記憶中脫困。

programme.title: E58
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E19 - 愛過之後 帶著清醒歸來
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E8 - 哈妮帥氣騎馬美如大片
programme.desc: 由黃明昊、哈妮克孜、李宏毅、秦霄賢、趙小棠等嘉賓組成「探玩行動派」，以全新升級的劇情式玩法解鎖城市新風貌；他們將以最年輕、最活力的方式穿越各大城市，發揮創新的思維，創造出全新的有趣玩法。

programme.title: E48 - 史上最完美身材男嘉賓亮相
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: E19 - 愛過之後 帶著清醒歸來
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E58
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E8 - 文藝女嘉賓溫柔登場
programme.desc: 由伊能靜、黃聖依、朱正廷、金子涵、戴燕妮、張純燁6位常駐戀愛觀察員、微反應專家姜振宇以及鄭爽組成「戀愛觀察團」，見證素人嘉賓們從素不相識到牽手成功的浪漫愛情故事。

programme.title: E20 - 女性健康必修課
programme.desc: 全新研發的大型互動健康科普節目；從「重治療」到「重預防」，加大醫療健康知識的深度普及，把權威的資訊送到身邊。

programme.title: E19 - 愛過之後 帶著清醒歸來
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E4 - 卡車路演正式開唱
programme.desc: 7位風格迥異的音樂人張震嶽、張碧晨、武藝、小鬼-王琳凱、歐陽娜娜、王赫野、陳卓璇將組成「音你小隊」，受邀參與一場馬來西亞音樂節，結伴踏上異國他鄉的文化探索之旅，沉浸式感受當地的風土人情，探尋當地音樂，進行面對面的音樂交流與互動，用音樂搭建起跨越國界的文化橋梁，展現出音樂無國界的魅力。

programme.title: E58
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E9 - 許美靜再現熒屏
programme.desc: 每集由一位原唱歌手對抗三位金曲守護人，以自己的非主打歌與主打歌同台PK，通過現場500位大眾聽審的投票決定挑戰是否成功。原唱歌手包括任賢齊、鄭少秋、吳克群、周筆暢、鄧紫棋、李克勤、趙傳、蔡健雅、許美靜、許茹芸等。

programme.title: E803 - Only Mime Will Tell / The Winning Spirit
programme.desc: For her try-out for the Varsity Mime Team, Luan must be silent for an entire day. // Afraid of failing her PE exam again, Lucy recruits the Morticians Club to help her pass.

programme.title: E223 - Ask Away-Way with Lay Lay
programme.desc: As class president, Sadie gets to host the announcements, and Lay Lay comes on the show as the advice expert. But, students start to get upset when the advice the girls give cause unnecessary fallout.

programme.title: E517 - Holey Moley
programme.desc: The gang thinks they have found the perfect tunnels to access all of Swellview, until they are confronted by the tunnels' original inhabitants.

programme.title: E207 - iHurt Lewbert
programme.desc: A 'Messing With Lewbert' sketch goes horribly awry, injuring Carly’s obnoxious doorman. The gang nurses him back to health until Freddie’s mother steps in and takes over. When a romance starts to blossom they have to stop it.

programme.title: E109 - Spoiler Alert / Something Fishy
programme.desc: The twins go to great lengths to protect Best's enjoyment of his book and realize spoilers aren't so bad after all. // Best and Bester may have jumped the line for the new fish restaurant, but once inside things take a dramatic turn.

programme.title: E102 - Stair Wars / Enemies a la Mode
programme.desc: Patrick and GrandPat try to pass each other on the stairs, leading to a ludicrous conflict. // The members of the Star family each confront their own absurd rivalries.

programme.title: E249 - Insecurity Guards
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick volunteer as guards at the museum, while Squidward attempts to hang his painting unnoticed.

programme.title: E103 - Bummer School
programme.desc: Chloe, Jinx, and Booch are designing a new school mascot, but Max and Phoebe's fighting ruins the project. After Chloe expresses her anger toward her siblings, they realize their twin-fighting impacts Chloe in new ways now that they're guardians.

programme.title: E114 - Vidja Games
programme.desc: Danger Force and Captain Man get hooked making celebrity 'Holla' videos to start raking in cash. But when making celebrity videos turns into a popularity contest, they accidentally send out a 'Holla' video that reveals their secret identities.

programme.title: E309 - JAM Session
programme.desc: When Ray hears that Piper is going to Junior Anger Management to work on her anger issues, he makes a wager with Henry that he can make her lose her temper before the night ends.

programme.title: E905 - Prom-Com / Scene Steeler
programme.desc: When Leni is put in charge of the school's prom, she is determined to make it the most memorable night ever. // Lincoln and Clyde cast Luan as the villain, Bee Trayal, in their David Steele film and have to deal with her method acting.

programme.title: E605 - The Taunting Hour / Musical Chairs
programme.desc: After Lincoln tries to help Lynn get over a heckler at her soccer game, the Louds realize they all have critics. // Lincoln convinces his teacher, Mr. Bolhofner, to join the Doo-Dads in order to get a better seat in class.

programme.title: E1012 - Student of the Jeer / Bean Dreams
programme.desc: Hoping to change her reputation at school, Stella tries to prove that she's not the teachers' pet. // Lori explores a potential career path after her boss suggests she has a strong future within the Burnt Bean organization.

programme.title: E206 - Prison Break
programme.desc: When Jack and Lil are grounded by Will and Min, who are then grounded by Halmoni, the family team up to escape their punishment.

programme.title: E107 - Stan's showtime
programme.desc: Stan claims to have a real Marsupilami appearing in a show he's putting on, but it's a fake robot.

Find out what is like to live in France, get to know its regions, and feel the true taste of France.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: E45
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Superhero Spinners
programme.desc: Alexia and Kloe are off to London to meet Dr. Xand and the Operation Ouch team to see if a scientist can figure out why they don't get dizzy when they spin. Izzy has a very important speed trial to see if she has what it takes to join the Olympic squad.

programme.title: The Deadly Zombie Fungus
programme.desc: The Cordyceps fungal spores are capable of controlling and killing insects. They enter the insect's body and digest it from the inside. They can even steer its mind and make it do things that help spread the spores further.

programme.title: Day of the Dream
programme.desc: Ricky is having weird dreams and makes surreal art, including giant hands and a burger hat inspired by Rene Magritte. After scoffing some cheesy snacks, Ricky gets his pajamas on to create illuminating dream art.

programme.title: Superhero Spinners
programme.desc: Alexia and Kloe are off to London to meet Dr. Xand and the Operation Ouch team to see if a scientist can figure out why they don't get dizzy when they spin. Izzy has a very important speed trial to see if she has what it takes to join the Olympic squad.

programme.title: Trip to Ecuador
programme.desc: Zoe's avocado tree is not in good shape, and she doesn't know how to revive it. Our friends travel to Ecuador, where they meet Idzi. He has a fabulous garden and a particular way to tend it.

programme.title: Trip to Japan - Part I
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo do not seem to know that there is a place on Earth where it is not at all polite to open a present in front of the person that gave it to you. Alim suggests bringing his friends to Japan, where they meet Kimiko.

programme.title: Trip to Morocco
programme.desc: Zoe is disgusted when she sees that Alim starts eating the chocolate mousse she prepared without a spoon. Soon after, they travel to Morocco and learn more about the eating customs there.

programme.title: Party Like it's 1859
programme.desc: When the team's high-tech dance party is threatened by a power outage, they're frustrated and fly off to find a place where things are still normal. Mistakenly, they end up at a historic village, where they live like it's 150 years ago!

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: Mini-Sprinters
programme.desc: Sprinter has built a lot of look-a-like robots to protect Hilltown. When DiktaThor arrives he tries to fight them but quickly realises that they aren`t the real superhero. Sprinter must step in to save the day.

programme.title: Trip to China
programme.desc: Zoe is writing a card to a friend but is afraid of making spelling mistakes. Is there a country in this world with no spelling rules at all? To find out, our friends travel to China, where people don't use letters but ideograms.

programme.title: The Amazing Maze
programme.desc: After Doki tells the story of Theseus and the labyrinth, Mundi boasts about her natural sense of direction. Gabi thinks Mundi relies on her ability to fly! To prove her skill, Mundi suggests they visit a hedge maze in Cumbria, England.

programme.title: Micro Mycology
programme.desc: How to make ice cream without a freezer? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of organic chemistry. Have hands-on fun by making your own ice cream, and get to know Gloria Lim, who studied fungi, their use to humans, and their role in decomposition.

programme.title: The Amazing Maze
programme.desc: After Doki tells the story of Theseus and the labyrinth, Mundi boasts about her natural sense of direction. Gabi thinks Mundi relies on her ability to fly! To prove her skill, Mundi suggests they visit a hedge maze in Cumbria, England.

programme.title: Croatia
programme.desc: Croatia adventure: Plitvice National Park and Bisevo exploration, European Eagle Owl encounter with local teens, rock climbing at Paklenica National Park, and a taste of Croatian folk music. A week of diverse escapades with Nicole in the incredible country of Croatia!

programme.title: Loki's Castle
programme.desc: The Nektons take over the Dark Orca submarine. But the pirates take over the Aronnax. No one is happy with having strangers in their homes.

programme.title: The Deadly Zombie Fungus
programme.desc: The Cordyceps fungal spores are capable of controlling and killing insects. They enter the insect's body and digest it from the inside. They can even steer its mind and make it do things that help spread the spores further.

programme.title: From the Stars
programme.desc: The Nektons try to stop a fallen satellite's fuel from polluting a marine sanctuary. But someone else is also interested in the satellite.

programme.title: The Very Unusual Stalk-eyed Fly
programme.desc: The stalk-eyed fly looks fairly normal as it emerges from its pupa. Then it blows air bubbles up inside its head and along the eyestalks - like blowing up the world's weirdest balloon. It does this to make itself look more attractive to other stalk-eyed flies.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: Trip to China
programme.desc: Zoe is writing a card to a friend but is afraid of making spelling mistakes. Is there a country in this world with no spelling rules at all? To find out, our friends travel to China, where people don't use letters but ideograms.

programme.title: Micro Mycology
programme.desc: How to make ice cream without a freezer? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of organic chemistry. Have hands-on fun by making your own ice cream, and get to know Gloria Lim, who studied fungi, their use to humans, and their role in decomposition.

programme.title: E4 - Infestation
programme.desc: Uninvited guests. Using sheer numbers to claim a territory, some animal groups are considered “pests.” But their very survival may depend on finding a home where they’re not welcome.

programme.title: E4 - The Lower Zambezi
programme.desc: Food, water and shelter are essential to all life on earth from the smallest of beings to the largest, and along the banks of one of Africa’s greatest rivers, some animals struggle while others thrive. A rhythm drives all animals as they journey in search of what they need to survive, and each must decide where and when to move if they’re to succeed... These are the magical worlds of the Lower Zambezi.

programme.title: E5 - Hollywoods Held Hostage
programme.desc: During the last few weeks of the dry season, the prides stick close to the only available water in the river. But in Luangwa, that proximity spells danger - especially when the scent of a hippo kill compels the Hollywoods to cross the river.

programme.title: E1 - A Wild Education
programme.desc: Welcome baby orangutan Topan, an orphan in need of a surrogate mom. Watch her learning journey in nursery school while her fellow students move through junior, senior, and wild-immersion schools. Meanwhile, 16-year-old Kasper preps for graduation.

programme.title: E2 - Zambia's Peaceful Primates
programme.desc: Kasanka National Park in Zambia is home to an unusual species of baboon. Kinda baboons have turned their backs on the aggressive displays of dominance usually associated with these large monkeys and lead altogether more peaceful lives. Living alongside one troop is a dedicated team of researchers whose mission it is to uncover these baboons’ secrets and understand what makes them who they are.

programme.title: E4 - Infestation
programme.desc: Uninvited guests. Using sheer numbers to claim a territory, some animal groups are considered “pests.” But their very survival may depend on finding a home where they’re not welcome.

programme.title: E4 - The Lower Zambezi
programme.desc: Food, water and shelter are essential to all life on earth from the smallest of beings to the largest, and along the banks of one of Africa’s greatest rivers, some animals struggle while others thrive. A rhythm drives all animals as they journey in search of what they need to survive, and each must decide where and when to move if they’re to succeed... These are the magical worlds of the Lower Zambezi.

programme.title: E5 - Detour
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of Australia’s shark highways. Find out if Greenly Island in the south is a truck stop for migrating great whites, then search for proof of a genetic connection between northern bull sharks and their cooler-climate cousins.

programme.title: E1 - A Wild Education
programme.desc: Welcome baby orangutan Topan, an orphan in need of a surrogate mom. Watch her learning journey in nursery school while her fellow students move through junior, senior, and wild-immersion schools. Meanwhile, 16-year-old Kasper preps for graduation.

programme.title: E2 - Human Influenced
programme.desc: In geological and biological scales, humans have only been around for the blink of an eye, and yet we’ve managed to influence the evolutionary path for many animals. Explore the human impact on dogs, wolves, coyotes, elephants, and more.

programme.title: E1 - A Wild Education
programme.desc: Welcome baby orangutan Topan, an orphan in need of a surrogate mom. Watch her learning journey in nursery school while her fellow students move through junior, senior, and wild-immersion schools. Meanwhile, 16-year-old Kasper preps for graduation.

programme.title: E6 - The Next Dynasty
programme.desc: The all-female Hollywood pride have been in exile after being attacked by the four Nomad brothers. But their leader, Ava, decides to lead her family south to the heart of their territory for a showdown with the Nomads.

programme.title: E3 - Villains
programme.desc: Meet nature’s most wanted and see why the baddest of the bad don’t get the respect they deserve. Admire the great white shark’s electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.title: E4 - Sidekicks
programme.desc: Unravel strange alliances that ensure mutual success in the wild. Explore the partnership between clownfish and anemones, watch oxpeckers keep savannah residents healthy, and review the quid-pro-poo agreements of dung beetles and pitcher plants.

programme.title: E5 - Sanctuary
programme.desc: There’s strength in numbers. Especially in the wild. For many species, it’s the very reason why individuals come together. Protecting the empire is imperative to survival. For these animals, protection means isolation – finding sanctuary from the threats outside their boundaries.

E3 - The Ghost Of Martel
programme.desc: Allen and Kanda investigate town Martel and find an Innocence taken by the Akuma. Kanda refuses to help Allen and leaves with the Martel residents.

programme.title: E4 - Aria Of The Land And The Night Sky
programme.desc: Allen is attacked by a level 2 Akuma that can imitate anybody. They learn that the ghost of Martel is not a ghost, but a moving and singing doll.

programme.title: E21 - Duck Schnitzel With Sweet Potato Waffles
programme.desc: Chef Deborah takes the chicken and waffles to the next level with her duck schnitzel and sweet potato waffles. She marinates and fries the duck, then mixes baked sweet potatoes with egg, milk and spices.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Murder
programme.desc: When her aunt is found dead, having mysteriously fallen overboard from a cruise ship, Olivia is thrown into rough seas as her uncle's secret past is brought to light and more deaths occur.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: E21 - Duck Schnitzel With Sweet Potato Waffles
programme.desc: Chef Deborah takes the chicken and waffles to the next level with her duck schnitzel and sweet potato waffles. She marinates and fries the duck, then mixes baked sweet potatoes with egg, milk and spices.

programme.title: A Model Murder
programme.desc: When web model Kara gets disturbing messages from a fan, influencer Cody comes to her aid. But when the stalker begins to show up in person, 'IRL' takes on a whole new level of meaning for Kara.

programme.title: E5 - Senior Cyst-Izen
programme.desc: Anthony is trying to move on from his troubled past, but his huge thigh lump is holding him back. Mary has a mysterious 70-year-old bump that amazes Drs. Lee and Tomassian.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Murder
programme.desc: When her aunt is found dead, having mysteriously fallen overboard from a cruise ship, Olivia is thrown into rough seas as her uncle's secret past is brought to light and more deaths occur.

programme.title: E3 - Abandonment Issues
programme.desc: Kristy and Rebecca ride their bikes through the backroads of Burnett in the Hill Country to check out a two-storey abandoned house in the woods. It's an unfinished renovation that's seen better days.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: E40
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.desc: The origin story of the man who became Dracula. Vlad III, Prince of Wallachia, enters into a Faustian pact to save his people and becomes inflicted with an insatiable thirst for human blood.

programme.title: E1 - Rocky Mountain Murder
programme.desc: In the shadow of the Rockies, Carolyn Jansen, 43, is found dead, stuffed into a duct-taped container. Detectives have two suspects but no clear way to tell who is the killer.

programme.title: E2 - Thou Shalt Not Kill
programme.desc: When a Christian ranch hand, Dan Lavigne, 52, is shot dead on his porch in Montana, 2002, deputies find no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: E1 - Women Who Kill - Thelma Yvonne Purchase
programme.desc: Greg Baker was a mathematician and calligrapher, and a devout Christian. He was disabled and reliant on caregivers. One of those was Thelma Yvonne Purchase, who took his life to get her hands on his money.

programme.title: E4 - One Punch Killer Or Protective Brother?
programme.desc: A frightening assault ends in tragedy when teenagers shoot splat ball guns at two brothers playing a nighttime basketball game. A fight ensues between the youths, leaving a 17-year-old dead at the scene.

programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Copycat
programme.desc: Holly Hunter is an ambitious cop who tries to draw the forensic psychologist out of her self-imposed exile to help catch a murderer who is copying work of other serial killers.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: A beautiful CIA officer accused of being a Russian spy must go on the run to clear her name and identify a would-be presidential assassin.

programme.title: Creature From The Black Lagoon
programme.desc: In one of the most beloved sci-fi horror classics ever, a mysterious amphibious monster escapes captivity in order to be with a scientist’s beautiful female lab assistant.

programme.title: Ligue 1 Specials 2025/26 E21 -Iconic Players - Olivier Giroud

E1 - We’re back
programme.desc: TV's most savage social experiment returns as Search4Hurt starts its mission to find the fittest everyday Aussies to join their hybrid sporting team, starting with HurtCamp.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E8 - Indonesia
programme.desc: Rooftop and Catfish explore Indonesia in a fiery way. The duo test out their manhoods with leech therapy, wall jumping, participating in a traditional whip dance, and trying the ancient martial art of debus. They then slow down for a moment to stop and smell the Indonesian fruit durian and cut one out of a tree to taste test. Finally their Indonesian adventure ends with a game of flaming soccer in the streets and sulfur mining in the mouth of a volcano. With all of these wild and dangerous activities, can Rooftop and Catfish handle the heat of Indonesia?

programme.title: E7 - Rent's Too High, Time To Buy
programme.desc: Newlyweds came home to Birmingham, AL, from their destination wedding to find that their rent is being raised beyond their budget.

programme.title: E1 - Let The Flames Begin
programme.desc: Single mum Monica heads to Sao Paolo, Brazil to find her dream man. Amber seeks romance in Dublin, Ireland. Heartbroken Harold travels to Singapore.

programme.title: E10 - Log Cabin Turns Forever Home
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny transform a couple's dark and drab log cabin into a relaxing retreat for the entire family.

programme.desc: Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman create cakes that look and move like theme park rides for Knott's Berry Farm's 100th anniversary.

programme.title: E919
programme.desc: Jhanak, determined to keep her mother's vow, embarks on a life-changing path. Facing hardships and loss, she encounters a man who adds a new layer of complexity to her journey.

programme.title: E129
programme.desc: Roshni stands firmly with her husband Raj as he chases his IAS dream. But when his betrayal breaks her trust, her life changes forever. Will she rebuild herself and fight back stronger than ever?

programme.title: E806
programme.desc: Sayali desires a fairytale romance, but fate intertwines her with Sachin, a complex figure. Will her dreams of a perfect life survive this unexpected connection?

programme.title: E5176
programme.desc: Dr. Abhimanyu, a misogynist, falls for Akshara, their daughter. Complications arise when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, also falls for him.

programme.desc: Time flew by, yet Tulsi Virani stood strong as the Sarvagunn matriarch! Can she navigate the challenges of modern-day parenting and relationships?

programme.title: Donnie Yen’s Action Series: Kung Fu Jungle
programme.desc: A vicious killer Feng is going round Hong Kong killing top martial arts exponents, leaving a secret weapon called the Moonshadow as his calling card. When convicted killer and kung fu expert, Xia, hears of this, he offers to help the police catch the killer, in return for his freedom. Despite their misgivings, the police release the former police martial arts instructor into their custody. With his help, they realize from the chronological order of the victims that the killer is targeting his victims, all the top masters in their martial arts style, following a martial code of training. When Xia also disappears after a close encounter with Feng, they suspect the worse...

programme.title: Men of Plastic
programme.desc: The most glamorous part of Seoul, Apgujeong thrives with new possibilities. Dae-guk who is a native of Apgujeong and rules its ground, is eager to start his own groundbreaking plastic surgery business. Then he encounters Ji-woo, the most talented surgeon in the area who lost his medical license due to someone sabotaging his reputation. Dae-guk effortlessly comes up with an idea to make this business happen, and he does everything he can to make Ji-woo his partner. Together, Dae-guk and Ji-woo open a whole new era of Apgujeong.

programme.title: Beyond The Sin
programme.desc: One rainy night, the dead body of a girl, the only daughter of Hong Kong police Yin Lok, is found in the wild. Polices based on clues, suspect has been identified. However, several more girls are murdered and murder cases keep happening. Yin begins to investigate his daughter's death and met a mentally retarded girls, he is looking for more clues from this special girl. Finally, Yin is getting closer to the truth...

programme.title: Donnie Yen’s Action Series: Ip Man 3
programme.desc: In the late 1950s, in Hong Kong which is under British colonial rule, Frank, a foreign property developer who colludes with the gangs and even the Police, is reclaiming houses and a school from the local community. It is not a good time for the Wing Chun master Ip Man to deal with young Bruce Lee who just applied for an apprenticeship. For the good of the people, he steps forward and re-enters the “battlefield”. In collaboration with another Wing Chun practitioner Tin Chi, Ip Man rescues the children kidnapped by the gangs...

programme.title: Mere Yaar Ki Shaadi Hai
programme.desc: Sanjay and Anjali don't realise their feelings for each other until Anjali gets betrothed to Rohit. Release Year: 2002 Director: Sanjay Gadhvi

programme.title: Kabhi Khushi Kabhie Gham
programme.desc: The younger son of a rich couple sets out in search of his elder brother who was disowned for marrying below their status. Release Year: 2001 Director: Karan Johar

programme.title: Hello Brother
programme.desc: Police Inspector Vishal gets a heart transplant of a courier man, Hero. Now Hero appears to Vishal, and guides him to the persons who killed him. Release Year: 1999 Director: Sohail Khan Awards: 1 Bollywood Movie Awards.

programme.title: Atithi Tum Kab Jaoge
programme.desc: A tired working couple hosts an uninvited guest who refuses to depart, suddenly turning their routine evening into a tense, humorous test of hospitality and boundaries. Release Year: 2010 Director: Ashwni Dhir Awards: 2011 Winner Apsara Award- Best Comic Actor- Paresh Rawal, 2011 Winner Bollywood BusineSS Award- Most Profitable Actor- Ajay Devgn

programme.desc: How do they turn a goat's favourite food into hair conditioner?

programme.desc: Brain surgery creates a perfect amnesiac who can't remember his own life from day to day.

Free Fighter
programme.desc: Kent was a member of the underground gang in the United States. He was attacked by the gangsters upon holding the key evidence of their criminal offences. Kent had no alternative but to seek FBI's protection. He mailed the crime evidence to his sister in Hong Kong. At the same time, he disguised as a girl and fled to Hong Kong. Here he contacted Mr. Green Village, leader of the underground gang for the selling of the smuggled diamond. His identification was revealed by two CID, Ching Shing and Tai Kau. Kent was brought to the Police Station and put under close supervision. They waited for Cindy, the FBI Officer to extradite him to the States for testimony. Kent escaped before her arrival. At that time, professional killers were sent to search for Kent with the help of Mr. Green Village after bribing him. It started a fatal game of hide and seek among Kent, Cindy, the police and their killers...

programme.title: Project A Part II
programme.desc: A group of Chinese revolutionaries are being bunted by agents of the Dowager Empress, and Jackie has to use all his courage, wits and physical prowess to keep the peace...

programme.title: Flirting Scholar
programme.desc: Tong Park Foo is the top-grade scholar in Suzhou. On a feast day, Tong and his friends go to visit the temple and there, Tong meets Chau Heung for the first time. Tong is shaken at Chau's beauty. He decides to go after her. But Chau's master Mrs. Wah is very angry with Tong's family, how can Tong make Chau Heung his bride?
